name: recover-bad-subzips
title: Recover 13 bad subzips using JAMSTEC source archive
description:
OVERLAP ANALYSIS RESULT (2026-05-11): JAMSTEC/bathymetry_data/ is NOT a complementary 2016+ subset. It is the SOURCE archive of NCEI_multibeam — 763 of 776 zips already processed (overlap 100% by basename), 0 only-in-NCEI, 13 only-in-JAMSTEC. Those 13 are exactly the files in NCEI_multibeam/raw/subzips_bad/ that failed to extract.

SCOPE: Try to recover those 13 bad subzips by re-extracting from JAMSTEC/bathymetry_data/{KR01-10,KR01-12_leg1,KR06-11,KR07-16,KY13-04,KY14-10,MR00-K02,MR02-K01,MR02-K04_leg1,MR02-K05_leg1,MR03-K01,MR03-K03_leg1,MR07-06_leg2_pi}*.zip. For each: (1) unzip -t to verify integrity; (2) if good, extract into raw/dat_by_subzip/; (3) re-run Step 01 manifest update on just those 13; (4) decide whether to push them through the full Step 02-07 pipeline or accept they were excluded. Small task, ~30-60 min.

OUT OF SCOPE: Building any new pipeline. NCEI_multibeam already covers JAMSTEC bathymetry. Gravity_data/ is a different topic.
creator: Ruichen Zhou
